## Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes introduced by this PR. (e.g., Added 50 missing universities in Country X, Fixed domain for Institution Y).

## Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue or incorrect data)
- [ ] ➕ Data addition (adding new institutions or filling in missing fields)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (new script, scraper, or enhancement)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## Validation Checklist
Before submitting this PR, please verify the following:
- [ ] The `domain` points to the canonical, root official website (no subdomains unless in aliases).
- [ ] I have run `python scripts/validate_domains.py` and it completes with 0 errors.
- [ ] There are no duplicate institutions or domains added.
- [ ] The JSON formatting is strictly valid.

## Additional Context
Please provide any links, sources, or context that verifying maintainers can use to quickly approve this addition.
